overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from a covered walkway with purple neon lights through intersections and down streets lined with massive digital billboards and neon signage. The scene features futuristic vehicles, pedestrians, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: turns left from open crosswalk into covered pedestrian walkway
enters darker covered area with artificial purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left from the crosswalk and walking into a covered urban walkway beneath an overpass

entered.detail: sloped concrete ramp leading up to street level with yellow safety stripes
vertical purple neon lights lining the left wall of the covered walkway
overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The clip begins at a yellow-striped crosswalk in a futuristic city at night. The camera turns left and enters a covered walkway, transitioning from the open street into a darker, enclosed space illuminated by purple neon lights on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with neon lighting

events.description: passes green motorcycle graffiti mural painted on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath purple neon lights, approaching the distant exit

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead in the walkway

entered.detail: green neon-style mural of a person riding a motorcycle painted on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the narrow covered walkway, the scene is dominated by vertical purple neon lights on the left wall and a green motorcycle graffiti mural on the right. The path is flanked by metal railings on the right and concrete walls, leading toward a bright exit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with neon signage and futuristic traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with bright neon signs
waits for futuristic vehicles to pass before crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: exiting the walkway and navigating across the multi-lane intersection with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving through the intersection
person in white coat waiting at the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading WEST WIND on the building facade
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing spanning the multi-lane road
large suspended digital screen displaying advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide intersection, the scene opens up to reveal the bright pink WEST WIND neon sign and heavy digital billboard coverage. The camera approaches and crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating between futuristic vehicles while a pedestrian in white waits at the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with overhead billboard canopy

events.description: continues straight down the center of the multi-lane street toward distant pedestrians
futuristic vehicles pass by on both sides while walking down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the neon-lit street surrounded by towering digital billboards and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the crosswalk

entered.detail: dense array of suspended digital billboards spanning across the entire street creating a canopy of light
sleek red sports car with glowing accents driving past

segments.scene_description: Walking down the center of a wide commercial street, the scene is dominated by a dense canopy of overhead digital billboards displaying vibrant advertisements. The camera moves toward a group of pedestrians in the distance while futuristic vehicles pass by on both sides, navigating through the yellow crosswalk lines that stretch down the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, enclosed urban corridor into the overwhelming brightness of a sprawling cyberpunk commercial district. It begins at a yellow-striped crosswalk before turning left to enter a narrow covered walkway, where the open city air is replaced by a darker space illuminated by purple neon lights and a green motorcycle graffiti mural. As the camera moves forward through this corridor, the enclosed walls give way to a bright exit that opens into a wide intersection dominated by a vivid pink West Wind neon sign and massive digital billboards. The scene then expands as the camera crosses another yellow-striped walkway, navigating between futuristic vehicles and pedestrians. Finally, the movement continues down the center of a wide street, where the environment becomes a dense canyon of vibrant overhead advertisements and flowing traffic.
